zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelicia FitzWalcher於大約1104年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Lord William Walcher30歲，母親Aelfflaed Bamburgh25歲。她於1132年與Swain de Stavelegh結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1200年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Adelicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Delysia
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelicia FitzWalcher was born about 1104, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Lord William Walcher, was 30 and her mother, Aelfflaed Bamburgh, was 25. She married Swain de Stavelegh in 1132. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1200, in North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelicia FitzWalcher est née environ 1104, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Walcher, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Aelfflaed Bamburgh, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Swain de Stavelegh en 1132. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1200, à North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelicia FitzWalcher um 1104 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William Walcher 30 und ihre Mutter Aelfflaed Bamburgh 25. Sie hat 1132 Swain de Stavelegh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1200 im Alter von 98 Jahren in North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Swain de Stavelegh nel 1132. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Adelicia FitzWalcherが約1104年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord William Walcherは30歳，母Aelfflaed Bamburghは25歳であった。1132年にSwain de Staveleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1200年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアで98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムダルハムダルハム カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Durham Cathedral, Durham, Durham, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Adelicia FitzWalcher(이)가 대략 1104년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Walcher(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aelfflaed Bamburgh(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1132년 Swain de Stavelegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Swain de Stavelegh em 1132. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelicia FitzWalcher родилась около 1104 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord William Walcher было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Aelfflaed Bamburgh, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Swain de Stavelegh в 1132 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1200 г. в местности норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам кэтедраль, дурам, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.
